title: Save WorkForms Question as a Template

posts.author: krasten (Kristen Harris)
posts.cookedHtml: Requesting the ability to save a WorkForms question as a template to be reused on multiple forms. I know I technically could duplicate the entire form, but it would be helpful to add a common question easily (ex: single select of list of 15+ departments, or intricate conditions).
